# Geo SEO Skill

## Auto-Load When

- creating city pages, service-area pages, multi-location content, or local business metadata

## Rules

- local pages must contain genuinely local context
- avoid duplicate city templates with token swaps only
- include service plus location intent in metadata
- use locality details, logistics context, or regional proof where available

## Checklist

- city-specific H1 and intro
- localized proof points or FAQs
- unique metadata
- route slug matches location intent
- internal links connect nearby or related locations

## Best Practices

- include neighborhood, region, or corridor language only if accurate
- reflect local operations constraints such as delivery radius or warehouse access when relevant
